'''yamat''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:younger siblings|younger siblings]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-m-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:younger siblings|younger siblings]]
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæmitith|yæmitith]] || [[word:yæmitij|yæmitij]] || [[word:yæmitish|yæmitish]] || [[word:yæmiti|yæmiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yamumututh|yamumututh]] || [[word:yamumutuj|yamumutuj]] || [[word:yamumutush|yamumutush]] || [[word:yamumutu|yamumutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yamututh|yamututh]] || [[word:yamutuj|yamutuj]] || [[word:yamutush|yamutush]] || [[word:yamutu|yamutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yamuftuth|yamuftuth]] || [[word:yamuftuj|yamuftuj]] || [[word:yamuftush|yamuftush]] || [[word:yamuftuf|yamuftuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæmeteth|yæmeteth]] || [[word:yæmetej|yæmetej]] || [[word:yæmetesh|yæmetesh]] || [[word:yæmete|yæmete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yamomototh|yamomototh]] || [[word:yamomotoj|yamomotoj]] || [[word:yamomotosh|yamomotosh]] || [[word:yamomoto|yamomoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yamototh|yamototh]] || [[word:yamotoj|yamotoj]] || [[word:yamotosh|yamotosh]] || [[word:yamoto|yamoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yamoftoth|yamoftoth]] || [[word:yamoftoj|yamoftoj]] || [[word:yamoftosh|yamoftosh]] || [[word:yamoftof|yamoftof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || — || — || — || [[word:yamïftïf|yamïftïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || — || — || — || [[word:yamïfmïftïf|yamïfmïftïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæmætæth|yæmætæth]] || [[word:yæmætæj|yæmætæj]] || [[word:yæmætæsh|yæmætæsh]] || [[word:yæmætæ|yæmætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yamamatath|yamamatath]] || [[word:yamamataj|yamamataj]] || [[word:yamamatash|yamamatash]] || [[word:yamamata|yamamata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yamatath|yamatath]] || [[word:yamataj|yamataj]] || [[word:yamatash|yamatash]] || [[word:yamata|yamata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yamaftath|yamaftath]] || [[word:yamaftaj|yamaftaj]] || [[word:yamaftash|yamaftash]] || [[word:yamaftaf|yamaftaf]]
|}

''50 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yamatatha|yamatatha]] || [[word:yamataja|yamataja]] || [[word:yamatasha|yamatasha]] || [[word:yamataka|yamataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yamatath|yamatath]] || [[word:yamataj|yamataj]] || [[word:yamatash|yamatash]] || [[word:yamata|yamata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yamatathal|yamatathal]] || [[word:yamatajal|yamatajal]] || [[word:yamatashal|yamatashal]] || [[word:yamatakal|yamatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yamatathatha|yamatathatha]] || [[word:yamatajaja|yamatajaja]] || [[word:yamatashasha|yamatashasha]] || [[word:yamataka|yamataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yamatathan|yamatathan]] || [[word:yamatajan|yamatajan]] || [[word:yamatashan|yamatashan]] || [[word:yamatakan|yamatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yamatathaoro|yamatathaoro]] || [[word:yamatajaoro|yamatajaoro]] || [[word:yamatashaoro|yamatashaoro]] || [[word:yamatakaoro|yamatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
